head: 44bc54a 2026-07-14 15:06:09 +0200
branches_note: ENG-2069 hazard confirmed and INVERTED: origin/dev is the remote default (git remote show origin -> HEAD branch: dev) and is the audited ref, but origin/main is 5 commits AHEAD of dev, carrying prod-wiring/relay fixes not back-merged to dev (cfe5944 relay engine integer meta.version as /v1 CAS version #38; c6628cf repoint prod KNOWLEDGE_URL/AI_URL at in-cluster Service DNS ENG-2082 #37; a11d1f3 point PROD wiki-api at cloud engine + session-exchange #36). Feature branches ahead of dev are all deploy/wiring, not story-behaviour code: fix/relay-integer-version-field (+5), fix/eng-2082-prod-upstream-dns (+4), fix/prod-engine-wiring-acceptance (+3), feat/d15-single-host-fanout (+1, already merged as #34 into dev). No story below flips status on any ahead branch.

E1-S1.note: Skeleton, six-tier internal/* layout, config load, and /healthz echoing cell+cluster are present and tested. GAP: AC4 fail-loud on missing CLUSTER_NAME is NOT implemented (config.Load defaults ClusterName to ""); router.go's own /healthz echoes only cell (server.Handler()'s echoes both).

E1-S2.note: Real httputil reverse proxy under /api/*; facade routes return typed 502 when engine unconfigured (contract_trace_test). Byte-identical parity is a stdlib ReverseProxy property, not asserted against a live engine here.

E1-S3.note: The /v1 verb-grammar surface is mounted alongside /api/*; any not-yet-composed verb answers a typed 501 X-Stub envelope (draft-marked), never a 404.

E1-S4.note: Token pass-through verbatim (bearer) real+tested; requireScope wires orvex-studio-lib/pkg/auth.RequireScope. Edge identity-verify is flag-gated (IDENTITY_VERIFY_ENABLED, default off) with a fail-closed notImplemented default caller verifier -- the K4 interim posture the story names.

E1-S5.note: 401/403/404 propagate verbatim from engine/knowledge via a typed mapping; no existence-oracle laundering into a generic 5xx. tested.

E1-S6.note: Blocking CI gates present: gofmt/golangci/gosec/govulncheck/test + a real no-AGPL-import guard + handler-thinness + route-table drift. The DfM golden-corpus 'parity job' is the one gate not in this repo (see E2-S5).

E2-S1.note: DfM->PM conversion composed in-process from orvex-studio-lib/pkg/dfm (the clean-room serializer lives in the lib, re-exported here as type aliases + New()); wiki-api never reimplements or mocks it.

E2-S2.note: PM->DfM reverse conversion + fidelity check via the lib serializer; opaque nodes are fenced (:::dfm-opaque:::) not dropped. tested. Reverse logic lives in the lib.

E2-S3.note: Opaque-node typed handles round-trip byte-identically (excalidraw exemplar tested); reattach-from-base logic lives in orvex-studio-lib/pkg/dfm and is exercised via the fidelity tests.

E2-S4.note: /v1/convert/to-prosemirror|to-dfm|fidelity are real in-process handlers backed by the embedded serializer + tests (the older /v1/convert/dfm-to-json draft paths remain typed 501 stubs).

E2-S5.note: Round-trip fidelity tests exist, but there is NO golden-corpus CI parity gate in THIS repo against the engine catalog+fixtures (that corpus lives in orvex-studio-lib); the in-repo contract gate is a route-table snapshot only, and a full external-contract diff is a disclosed cross-repo follow-up.

E3-S1.note: Verb dispatch over {resource_type,locator} for search/get/save/edit/list is real+tested; no ask verb (by design).

E3-S2.note: Locator resolution composes engine resolvers for id|slug|auto|url. title/NL dialects are PERMANENTLY refused with a typed error (no engine resolver primitive exists) -- so the story's url/slug/title/NL set is only partially served, by design.

E3-S3.note: info->outline(token_estimate)->blocks/{id}?format=dfm read ladder plus ranged block reads, all real+tested.

E3-S4.note: Space tree, backlinks, breadcrumbs delegate to engine primitives (cursor-paginated); tested.

E3-S5.note: search fronts knowledge and related is real engine link-graph adjacency; typed-error degradation via classifyReadLadderError. No distinct 'duplicates' surface is implemented.

E4-S1.note: DfM->apply-ops translation with anchor/heading resolution and a single atomic apply-ops call; tested against recorded engine fixtures.

E4-S2.note: CAS ifVersion->409 VERSION_MISMATCH plus a verified read-after-write receipt {url,id,version,persisted:true}, incl per-type block-authoring; tested.

E4-S3.note: Typed needs_human_publish/needs_human_confirm codes + the DeepLink envelope are DEFINED, but no live path emits them: specgate.Check (which would transport the engine-minted RATIFY/CONFIRM token verbatim) returns ErrNotImplemented, and blockpatch human-gating is comment-only. Human-gated transport is scaffolded, not wired.

E4-S4.note: ai-origin writes have NO privileged path -- they traverse the same /v1 block-patch chokepoint with the caller's delegated token; the token-passthrough/no-amplification property is proven by test.

E4-S5.note: QUOTA_EXCEEDED 402 relayed verbatim with the Studio upgrade deep-link (never masked as 5xx); a batch write fails whole via bulkops. tested.

E4-S6.note: Generic orvex_dashboard block is registered + validated (dashboardId), decoupled from any linear_* type, and authored through the block chokepoint with a receipt. Scope is a generic dashboard embed, not specifically a milestone-scoped graph builder.

E5-S1.note: One shaping layer: field projection (?fields=), concise|detailed verbosity, and cursor pagination -- wired through every read rung via projectJSON; tested.

E5-S2.note: Body-offload emits resource_link handles + token estimates above a budget; the offloaded Blocks read derefs through the ACL-gated read route. tested.

E5-S3.note: A served /v1/openapi.json descriptor + write-contract conformance tests + an in-repo route-table drift gate are present. Full conformance against the contracts-authored external OpenAPI (orvex-studio-contracts/openapi/wiki-api.yaml) is a DISCLOSED cross-repo follow-up (CI lacks clone access) -- the descriptor is self-authored here, not yet diffed against the authored contract.

E6-S1.note: Living-wiki drift verification (VerifyPage/GetDrift/force-new-token) with a real content-hash drift metric + quarantine; real HTTP handlers and a full per-file test suite.

E6-S2.note: The spec-gate package, wiring, route, and the {satisfied,token,reason} result shape exist, but the core is an explicit stub: Check()/GateState() return ErrNotImplemented and v1SpecGate/v1RatifyGate answer a typed 501. The de-Linearized text-only story-id gate is a documented TODO, not implemented.

E6-S3.note: External-agent POST /v1/audit shapes + forwards to the engine WORM sink via AuditForwardClient, with a verified caller-identity seam + correlated request-id + full tests.

E7-S1.note: Event-evicted Redis artifact cache + evict consumer with a fail-closed cross-cell guard; tested. The Kafka evict Trigger is Phase-0-deferred at the deploy layer (kafka-trigger-evict.yaml commented out); the handler is wired ahead of it.

E7-S2.note: Per-verb + facade-overhead SLIs are real (in-process ring, p95, exposed on /health), but there are NO OTel traces and NO Prometheus /metrics endpoint -- both explicitly deferred (sli.go: orvex-studio-lib/pkg/metrics is a closed name-set owned elsewhere). Observability is only partially met.

E7-S3.note: Health-vs-liveness split is real (/healthz never round-trips upstreams; /health reports upstream state + echoes CLUSTER_NAME). GAP: /health reports only whether each upstream is CONFIGURED (Configured() booleans), NOT a real dependency round-trip probe.

E7-S4.note: Bulk per-item latency budget + the non-SSE upstream 30s deadline are present and asserted. The full facade/warm-cache/rebuild benchmark suite the story names is not fully evidenced (no warm-cache/rebuild benchmark).

E7-S5.note: Standalone degradation posture (typed 502 on an unconfigured/unreachable engine) is present everywhere. The redaction-below-relocation-line PARITY TEST (NFR-A3) is ABSENT -- no redaction logic exists in the tree.

summary: The origin/dev tree substantially implements the wiki-api PRD: the /v1 verb grammar, read ladder, DfM<->PM convert surface, block-patch write chokepoint with CAS + verified receipts + quota relay, the response-shaping/body-offload layer, drift governance, external audit-write to the engine WORM sink, and the event-evicted cache are all real and meaningfully tested (24/33 present). Nine stories are partial: the spec-gate (Check/GateState are ErrNotImplemented stubs), human-gated transport (codes defined but no live path), observability (in-process SLIs only -- no OTel/Prometheus), dependency round-trip health, redaction parity, the golden-corpus/full-contract gates, and title/NL locator resolution. Nothing is fully absent -- every story has at least real scaffolding.
